name: learnease-pro
description: An eLearning management system built using the MERN stack.
author: Scott Heath (heathmedia)

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names 'SERVER,CLIENT' --prefix-colors 'blue,green' 'npm run dev --prefix server' 'npm run dev --prefix client'
scripts.install:all: npm install & npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed --prefix server
